history.content: Hey Claw, I have codex running on vs code, can you check the status of it, is codex still workingor is it finished
Hey! I can’t directly check your VS Code processes, but you can look at the status bar or terminal where Codex is running to see if it’s still active or finished.
Hey Claw, I have codex running on vs code, can you check the status of it, is codex still workingor is it finished
If it's a GitHub Copilot extension, it might show as "Running" in the status bar.
